**What problem does this solve**

What you're trying to do that podframes can't (or makes awkward) today.

**Proposed solution**

How you imagine it working. Note: we prefer exposing raw provider params over
inventing wrapper options, and minimal UI over more controls — see CONTRIBUTING.md.

**Alternatives considered**

Anything you tried or ruled out.
